So what Scrunch does is it uses different prompts and it pings LLMs like these, like ChatGPT, Claude, Google Gemini, Perplexity, and it pings them during the day.
It gathers the responses and then it analyzes them to evaluate your presence and the presence of your competitors in different responses.
The thing with LLMs is they don't share user prompts and they probably won't ever do that.
So it's kind of a black box.
So what we do is we...
Use AI and the audience personas that we have on Logic.
